CREATE TABLE values_table (value_list LIST INTEGER, index_list LIST INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE additional_values (id INTEGER, value_list LIST INTEGER);
SELECT list_select(value_list, index_list) FROM values_table WHERE index_list IS NOT NULL;
SELECT list_select(a.value_list, b.index_list) FROM values_table a JOIN additional_values b ON a.value_list[1] = b.value_list[1];
SELECT list_select(value_list, index_list) FROM values_table WHERE index_list = [0, 1, 2] AND value_list = [1, 2, 3, 4];
